<style>
  .tree-wrap { padding: 1rem 0 2rem; font-size: 14px; }
  .legend { display: flex; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; align-items: center; }
  .legend-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 12px; color: #666; }
  .legend-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .branch-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; }

  .root-node {
    text-align: center;
    background: #fff;
    border: 1.5px solid #aaa;
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 14px 20px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 15px;
    color: #222;
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  }

  .branch-col { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }

  .branch-header {
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 10px 14px;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 13px;
    cursor: pointer;
    user-select: none;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px;
    border: 0.5px solid transparent;
    transition: opacity 0.15s;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }
  .branch-header:hover { opacity: 0.82; }
  .chevron { font-size: 10px; transition: transform 0.2s; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .branch-header.open .chevron { transform: rotate(180deg); }

  .author-list {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: max-height 0.3s ease;
    max-height: 0;
  }
  .author-list.open { max-height: 600px; }

  .author-card {
    border-radius: 8px;
    border: 0.5px solid #ddd;
    padding: 8px 12px;
    background: #f9f9f9;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
  }
  .author-card:hover { border-color: #bbb; background: #fff; }
  .author-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #222; margin: 0 0 2px; }
  .author-desc { font-size: 11px; color: #666; margin: 0; line-height: 1.4; }
  .author-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 10px;
    padding: 1px 6px;
    border-radius: 99px;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  .b-ee   { background: #E1F5EE; border-color: #0F6E56 !important; color: #085041; }
  .b-ge   { background: #EEEDFE; border-color: #534AB7 !important; color: #3C3489; }
  .b-dt   { background: #FAEEDA; border-color: #854F0B !important; color: #633806; }
  .b-inst { background: #FAECE7; border-color: #993C1D !important; color: #712B13; }

  .dot-ee   { background: #1D9E75; }
  .dot-ge   { background: #7F77DD; }
  .dot-dt   { background: #BA7517; }
  .dot-inst { background: #D85A30; }

  .badge-intl   { background: #E6F1FB; color: #0C447C; }
  .badge-flacso { background: #EAF3DE; color: #27500A; }

  .prop-node {
    margin-top: 16px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 1.5px dashed #aaa;
    padding: 12px 16px;
    background: #f5f5f5;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .prop-title { font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #222; margin: 0 0 4px; }
  .prop-desc { font-size: 11px; color: #666; margin: 0 0 8px; }
  .prop-links { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; justify-content: center; }
  .prop-link {
    font-size: 11px; padding: 3px 8px;
    border-radius: 99px; border: 0.5px solid #ccc;
    background: #fff; color: #555;
  }
</style>

<div class="tree-wrap">
  <div class="legend">
    <strong style="font-size:12px;color:#555;">Ramas:</strong>
    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot dot-ee"></div>Economía ecológica</div>
    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot dot-ge"></div>Geografía económica</div>
    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot dot-dt"></div>Desarrollo territorial</div>
    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot dot-inst"></div>Instituciones</div>
    <span style="margin-left:auto;display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;">
      <span class="author-badge badge-intl">Internacional</span>
      <span class="author-badge badge-flacso">FLACSO</span>
    </span>
  </div>

  <div class="root-node">ESPACIO, REDES Y DESARROLLO</div>

  <div class="branch-grid" id="qmd-branches"></div>

  <div class="prop-node">
    <div class="prop-title">Mi propuesta: centralidad topológica</div>
    <div class="prop-desc">Convergencia de cuatro líneas de investigación</div>
    <div class="prop-links">
      <span class="prop-link">Falconí &amp; Vallejo → pasivos socioambientales</span>
      <span class="prop-link">Jackson → redes sociales y económicas</span>
      <span class="prop-link">Portocarrero &amp; Durán → territorios híbridos</span>
      <span class="prop-link">Pérez Oviedo → razonamiento causal</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
  var data = [
    {
      id: 'ee', label: 'Economía ecológica<br>y metabolismo social',
      cls: 'b-ee',
      authors: [
        { name: 'Georgescu-Roegen', desc: 'Entropía y termodinámica', intl: true },
        { name: 'Martinez-Alier', desc: 'Conflictos de contenido ecológico', intl: true },
        { name: 'Bunker', desc: 'Extracción en la Amazonía', intl: true },
        { name: 'Falconí & Vallejo', desc: 'Pasivos socioambientales', intl: false },
        { name: 'Alvarado González', desc: 'Ciclos de Hubbert', intl: false },
      ]
    },
    {
      id: 'ge', label: 'Geografía económica<br>y econometría espacial',
      cls: 'b-ge',
      authors: [
        { name: 'Anselin & Arbia', desc: 'Dependencia espacial', intl: true },
        { name: 'Jackson', desc: 'Social and Economic Networks', intl: true },
        { name: 'LeSage', desc: 'Modelos Durbin espaciales', intl: true },
        { name: 'Álvarez & Jácome', desc: 'Inclusión y pobreza espacial', intl: false },
        { name: 'Cabrera-Barona', desc: 'Índices multicriterio', intl: false },
      ]
    },
    {
      id: 'dt', label: 'Desarrollo territorial<br>y sociología rural',
      cls: 'b-dt',
      authors: [
        { name: 'Pierre Bourdieu', desc: 'Efectos de lugar', intl: true },
        { name: 'Amartya Sen', desc: 'Enfoque de capacidades', intl: true },
        { name: 'Martínez Valle', desc: 'Transformación rural', intl: false },
        { name: 'Portocarrero & Durán', desc: 'Territorios híbridos', intl: false },
        { name: 'Siza León', desc: 'Racismo espacial', intl: false },
      ]
    },
    {
      id: 'inst', label: 'Instituciones, causalidad<br>y acción colectiva',
      cls: 'b-inst',
      authors: [
        { name: 'Elinor Ostrom', desc: 'Gobierno de los comunes', intl: true },
        { name: 'Acemoglu & Robinson', desc: 'Instituciones y desarrollo', intl: true },
        { name: 'Pérez Oviedo', desc: 'Razonamiento causal', intl: false },
        { name: 'Gordillo & Andrango', desc: 'Cohesión y cooperación', intl: false },
        { name: 'Manosalvas', desc: 'Acción pública', intl: false },
      ]
    }
  ];

  var container = document.getElementById('qmd-branches');

  data.forEach(function(branch) {
    var col = document.createElement('div');
    col.className = 'branch-col';

    var header = document.createElement('div');
    header.className = 'branch-header ' + branch.cls + ' open';
    header.innerHTML = '<span>' + branch.label + '</span><span class="chevron">▼</span>';

    var list = document.createElement('div');
    list.className = 'author-list open';

    branch.authors.forEach(function(a) {
      var card = document.createElement('div');
      card.className = 'author-card';
      var badge = a.intl
        ? '<span class="author-badge badge-intl">Internacional</span>'
        : '<span class="author-badge badge-flacso">FLACSO</span>';
      card.innerHTML = badge + '<p class="author-name">' + a.name + '</p><p class="author-desc">' + a.desc + '</p>';
      list.appendChild(card);
    });

    header.addEventListener('click', function() {
      var isOpen = list.classList.contains('open');
      list.classList.toggle('open', !isOpen);
      header.classList.toggle('open', !isOpen);
    });

    col.appendChild(header);
    col.appendChild(list);
    container.appendChild(col);
  });
})();
</script>
